title: Registration details of ships flying a Delaware flag

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Registration documents and ownership of the following yachts and ships which were flying a Delaware flag in 2022 and 2023: 

AL IMAM ALI: Yacht flying Delaware flag in Sep 2022
AKWA : Yacht flying Delaware flag in Oct 2022. Primary vessel number: 681166, manufacturer hull number: CEL60001G484, Build year: 1984, US flag 
BAYRAM AMCA: Possibly a yacht or a fishing ship, flying Delaware flag in Jul/Aug 2022 
CAVALLA 1: Yacht flying Delaware flag in Dec 2022 and Sep 2023
NAVY OSCAR: Yacht flying Delaware flag in Aug 2022
RIAD: Yacht flying Delaware flag in Jun/Jul 2022

Any information on their current status that may be available to the Delaware authorities.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Selma Mhaoud
